subject: feat(ui): make filtered subtitle clickable to open filter sidebar
body:
When filters are active, the header subtitle now reads
"Showing X of Y changes · Filtered" as a clickable link that opens
the filter sidebar. Uses dotted underline + primary color to signal
interactivity. Helps non-technical users discover why they're seeing
a subset and how to change it.

Tags: ui, ux, accessibility, filters
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor

title: make filtered subtitle clickable to open filter sidebar
